title: 3D Staves
body:
Tired of the old, flat staff textures? Me neither but I made them 3D anyways.

Adds models for all staves from the base [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) mod. Does not add models for any staves from other mods or addons.

Features flipped models of asymmetrical staves for left-handed players. Behaivor can be inverted by setting the staff's CustomModelData tag to 1.

![All wooden staves as seen in the right hand.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b0ca0defcd502870a7ae70ad60db6fed0dedaae.png)
